calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition For Order For Relif From Claims Statute
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER LATHEM BONEM'S Petition for Order for Relief from Claims Statute. Appearances: Kevin J. Gray, of Harrington, Foxx, Dubrow & Canter, LLP (415) 288-6600, appearing for Respondent San Mateo County Transit District, and opposing party; Robert. E. Cartwright, of the Cartwright Law Firm, (415) 433-0444, appearing for Petitioner and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Petition denied. Defense counsel will prepare proposed Order. (302/CWW/PB)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
